issues.title: Adding new output converters
issues.body:
**Expected Behavior**

It would be nice that if Spring Ai supports multiple output converter implementations like CSVOutputConverter, YamlOutputConverter and especially XmlOutputConverter.

**Current Behavior**

There is only List,Map,Bean(JSON) Converter.

**Context**

1. If there is some requirements that wants to save a structured output as file and then handle it in business logic, it would be helpful.
2. If someone uses Claude, supporting XmlOutputConverter would be helpful.


I think I can create a pull request for it.

comments.body: @tzolov Hello. I want to contribute this. Can I create a pull request? I'm new to contribute opensource so I mentioned you in this issue.
@tzolov Thank you for your reply! I just want to contribute this project. So I'm going to find another things to contribute. :)
